insights: The market has successfully established a new, higher baseline above 1,300 jobs following a significant step-up in volume mid-month, suggesting a sustained increase in hiring capacity.
Software Engineering remains the primary driver of market growth, consistently absorbing the bulk of new listings while Data-related roles show signs of temporary stagnation or consolidation.
The 30-day average (1,266) is significantly lower than the current level (1,361), indicating strong momentum that is likely to continue as companies finalize Q3/Q4 hiring pipelines.
